error: AssertionError: customer billed twice for the same invoice after gateway retry
stack_trace:
File "billing/charges.py", line 88, in settle
    assert ledger.count(invoice_id) == 1
resolution: Race between original attempt and retry worker. Fixed by adding an idempotency key on charge creation keyed by event id.

error: AssertionError: side effect applied 2 times — two workers consumed the same message concurrently
stack_trace:
File "events/consumer.py", line 41, in handle
    assert applied == 1
resolution: Concurrent consumers raced on the same event. Fixed by deduplicating on event id before applying side effects (same class of fix as the billing idempotency key).

stack_trace:
File "payments/webhook.py", line 87, in retry_request
    raise TimeoutError
resolution: Increased retry backoff to 2^n seconds with jitter in retry_request()

error: TimeoutError: Payment gateway did not respond within 30s
resolution: Increased gateway timeout to 60s and added circuit breaker
Moved report generation to async background task
JWT token expiry was 1s in test config — fixed to 3600s
Same token expiry recurrence — teardown not resetting config; added fixture cleanup

error: PermissionError: User does not have admin role
resolution: Test user not granted admin role in setUp — fixed fixture
Increased DB pool size from 10 to 25
Recurred under load — added connection timeout and pool recycling
SMTP credentials rotated but test env not updated — fixed .env.test

error: IndexError: list index out of range
resolution: Added guard for empty results before indexing
Off-by-one in pagination — page_size exclusive of last item
Frontend renamed 'product_id' to 'item_id' without updating backend
Email made required in serializer but test created users without email

error: AssertionError: Cache not cleared after update
resolution: Cache key missing tenant prefix — updated key generation

error: FileSizeError: File exceeds maximum allowed size of 10MB
resolution: Test uploaded 15MB fixture — reduced to 5MB

error: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429 Too Many Requests
resolution: Rate limit counters shared between test runs — added isolation
WebSocket server not started in test setup — added ws_server fixture

error: MemoryError: Unable to allocate array for 500000 rows
resolution: Changed to streaming paginated response
